food.desc: Berries, bark, whatever you can find.

machete.desc: A heavy blade. Good for cutting through dense undergrowth.

axe.desc: An old woodcutter's axe. The edge is still sharp.

climbing_gear.desc: Rope, hooks, and a worn harness. Someone left this behind.

raft.desc: A rough raft of lashed logs. Heavy, but it will float.

torch.desc: A rag-wrapped stick soaked in fat. It will burn.

note.desc: A folded note written in shaky handwriting.

backpack.desc: A worn canvas pack. Loops of cord let you lash extra gear to it.

raft.desc: Lash logs together with a stone weight.

torch.desc: Wrap a stick in fat-soaked cloth and tie it off.

rope+hook.desc: You thread the hook onto the rope and test the harness. It will hold.

hook+rope.desc: You thread the hook onto the rope and test the harness. It will hold.

log+log.desc: Two logs lashed together. You need more.

note_text: If you are reading this, you found my camp.
I came from the east — through the foothills. There is rope and gear
wedged in the rock face near the split boulder. You cannot miss it.
The pines to the west hid my blade for weeks. Look under the largest
fallen log. The oilcloth will have kept the edge clean.
North of here the trees are wrong. Something lives in them.
I found an axe behind the big mossy boulder — use it, but go carefully.
Do not try to cross the river without a raft. I watched a man try.
Get out. Light the fire on the high tower.

rooms.name: Forest Clearing
rooms.description: Moonlight spills into a wide clearing ringed by ancient oaks. A crumbling stone well sits near the centre. Deep animal tracks cut through the mud near the eastern tree line. A ring of scorched stones marks an old fire to the south-east.
rooms.description_with_torch: Your torch pushes the dark back. The clearing feels less exposed. Near the well you can make out faint scratch marks in the stone — letters, maybe.
rooms.description_with_axe: The axe feels right in your hands. The clearing seems smaller somehow, more manageable.

features.label: W
features.desc: A stone well. The rope is gone. Cold air rises from the dark below. Faint scratch marks ring the edge — you make out the letters W and T.
features.examine_clue: The scratches read: W is west, T is north. Someone left directions.

features.label: T
features.desc: Animal tracks pressed deep in the mud. They come from the north and circle the clearing twice before heading west.
features.examine_clue: The tracks are cloven. Whatever made them was heavy. They came from the north — shadow trees.

features.label: F
features.desc: A ring of scorched stones. Recent ash, not yet scattered. Someone built this fire within the last day.
features.examine_clue: Under the stones you find a folded note half-burned at the corner. Take it.

rooms.name: Shadow Trees
rooms.description: Tall trunks crowd together until the sky disappears. Every step snaps a twig too loud. Something watches from between the trees. A mossy boulder sits half-buried near the centre. Scratch marks scar the bark of a nearby pine.
rooms.description_with_torch: The torchlight makes the shadows jump and writhe. It is worse with the light. You can see the claw marks clearly now — they are fresh.
rooms.description_with_machete: The machete gives you something to hold. The watching feeling does not go away but at least you have an answer for it.

features.label: B
features.desc: A mossy boulder, half-buried. The gap behind it is dark. There is something wedged in there.
features.examine_clue: You reach into the gap and pull out an axe wrapped in oilcloth. The edge is still good.

features.label: S
features.desc: Claw marks deep in the bark. Four parallel gouges at about head height. They point south — toward the clearing.
features.examine_clue: The marks are too regular for any animal you know. Spaced like fingers. Something with hands made these.

rooms.name: Soggy Path
rooms.description: Mud clings to your boots with every step. The ground sucks at your feet like it wants to keep you. A gnarled root breaks the surface near the middle. Somewhere south, water roars like it never sleeps. A rusted tin cup sits in the mud.
rooms.description_with_raft: You are carrying the raft. It is awkward and heavy and bangs against every tree. But it will get you across.

features.label: R
features.desc: A thick gnarled root humps out of the mud. Easy to trip on in the dark.
features.examine_clue: The root runs south toward the river. Old and deep-set. This path has been here a long time.

features.label: C
features.desc: A rusted tin cup half-buried in the mud. A name is scratched inside: R.
features.examine_clue: The same initial as the note in the clearing. Whoever camped here was heading south — toward the river.

rooms.name: Stone Foothills
rooms.description: Loose rock slides underfoot. The forest thins here, replaced by cold stone and a rising wind. A boulder split by lightning marks this place. Scratched into the rock face: an arrow pointing up.
rooms.description_with_climbing_gear: The harness sits right on your shoulders. You have done this before, maybe. Your hands know the hooks.

features.label: B
features.desc: A boulder split clean by lightning. One half leans against the other like old friends.
features.examine_clue: The split is old, the edges worn smooth. The crack runs east toward the cliff face. A natural path.

features.label: I
features.desc: Scratched into the rock: an arrow pointing up. Below it, one word worn almost smooth. You can barely make out: TOWER.
features.examine_clue: The arrow points northeast. Someone who knew the way left this mark. The tower is real.

rooms.name: Fallen Pines
rooms.description: Old pines lie snapped and piled like bones. The air smells of pitch and rot. A rusted tin lantern hangs from a branch. Half hidden under a log: something wrapped in oilcloth.
rooms.description_with_axe: With the axe you could clear some of this. The pines would give good wood. The path west might be cuttable.

features.label: L
features.desc: A rusted tin lantern on a low branch. The oil is long gone. But behind it, hanging from the same nail, is a rolled canvas pack.
features.examine_clue: You unhook the pack from the nail. It is worn but sound. It will let you carry more.

features.label: P
features.desc: Pines piled high, bark stripped white. Under the nearest log, oilcloth is bundled around something long and heavy.
features.examine_clue: You drag the bundle out. A machete, edge still clean under the cloth. Take it.

rooms.name: Bramble Wall
rooms.description: A wall of brambles and thorned vines blocks the way. You would get shredded without something to cut through.

requires.message: The brambles tear at you. You need a machete to cut through.

rooms.name: Rushing River
rooms.description: A river roars past, black and fast. The current would drag you under in seconds.

requires.message: The river is too violent to cross. You need a raft.

rooms.name: Black Cliffline
rooms.description: A sheer wall of dark rock rises ahead. Handholds are scarce. One slip and you are done.

requires.message: You cannot climb this safely. You need climbing gear.

rooms.name: Deep Woods
rooms.description: The forest grows so thick the light dies entirely. You can feel the trees closing in around you.

requires.message: The forest is too dense. You need an axe to cut through.
